queries.question: Show me the model and operator of the camera that was last purchased.
queries.sql: SELECT Brand_Name, Cinematographer FROM Camera ORDER BY Purchase_Year DESC LIMIT 1
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/filmmaking/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?brand_name ?cinematographer WHERE {
  ?camera a :Camera .
  ?camera p:Brand_Name ?brand_name .
  ?camera p:Cinematographer ?cinematographer .
  ?camera p:Purchase_Year ?purchase_year_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?purchase_year_o)
LIMIT 1
